compiled_state.title: promptfooconfig.yaml prompt template still teaches sprint context for resolution loop instead of config-driven routing
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description: The implementation-plan eval prompt template (promptfooconfig.yaml lines 81-85) still says 'Resolution loop (sprint context)' which teaches the LLM the old sprint/standalone routing. Task 325e-41c2 added 4 new approach-resolution eval test cases but did not update the shared prompt template to teach config-driven routing via APPROACH_RESOLUTION. This causes the 4 new evals to fail because the model follows the prompt template instructions over the per-test user prompt. Fix: update line 81 to reference config-driven routing and remove sprint context reference from the resolution loop description.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Eval prompts fixed - updated shared prompt template (line 81) from sprint-context routing to config-driven APPROACH_RESOLUTION routing, updated 2 test case prompts and 1 rubric that referenced sprint context
comments.author: Test
